# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

kong:
  administration:
    listen: 0.0.0.0:8001 # Admin API accessibility

  data:
    platename: my-gateway
    uuid: your-unique-id

  service:
    enable_request_validation: true

  log:
    access: /var/log/kong/access.log
    error: /var/log/kong/error.log
    debug: off
    format: json

  http:
    hostname: your-domain.com
    cors_origins: ['*'] # For development purposes, replace with appropriate production values
    tls:
      certfile: /etc/letsencrypt/live/your-domain.com/fullchain.pem
      keyfile: /etc/letsencrypt/live/your-domain.com/privkey.pem

  service_discovery:
    enable: true
    etcd:
      hosts: [etcd-host:2379] # Replace with appropriate production values

  db:
    enabled: true
    name: kong
    host: your-db-host
    port: 5432
    user: your-db-user
    password: your-db-password
    database: your-database
